title: One
why_this_song: One by Metallica (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Landmine has taken my sight"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I can't remember anything"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I'm waking up, I cannot see"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Hold my breath as I wish for death"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Hold my breath as I wish for death"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Back in the womb it's much too real
In pumps life that I must feel
But can't look forward to reveal

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "taken" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "taken" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But can't look forward to reveal

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Can't tell if this is true or dream
Hold my breath as I wish for death

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "One" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "One"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Metallica one question about "One", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Metallica sobre "One", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "One" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "One" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
